heading: Omitted
label: 1122 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which directed the distribution of certain judgment funds as provided in former sections 1122 to 1130 of this title, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–309, § 186 Stat. 199June 2, 1972
